title: moon: An R Package Implementing the Modeling Obesity in Norway (MOON) Markov Cohort Model
description: An R implementation of the MOON (Modeling Obesity in Norway) Markov cohort model originally published by Bjornelv et al. (2021). It simulates obesity prevalence, incremental health-care costs, and years of life lost in a Norwegian birth cohort over the life course. This package is an R port and refactor of the original Excel/VBA implementation.
